summary: Cantrill recaps a well-attended Solaris BOF (Birds of a Feather) session at USENIX '04, where he discussed DTrace, Zones, and other upcoming Solaris 10 technologies. He shares resources for attendees and expresses gratitude for the positive reception. The post hints at his playful disdain for compiler developers and teases upcoming features like ZFS.
key_points: Solaris BOF at USENIX '04 was well-attended
Discussed DTrace, Zones, and Predictive self-healing
ZFS and service management facility coming soon
Positive community reception to Solaris 10 technologies
money_quotes: It's tremendously rewarding for us to see you so excited about these technologies!
key_insight: The Solaris team found genuine motivation in seeing the developer community embrace their new technologies at USENIX.
